name: flapple
flavor_texts: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns.
It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.
text: Flapple is the Apple Wing Pokémon. It is a grass and dragon-type Pokémon. Abilities: ripen, gluttony, hustle (hidden). Base stats — HP: 70, Attack: 110, Defense: 80, Sp. Atk: 95, Sp. Def: 60, Speed: 70. Evolution line: applin → flapple → appletun → dipplin → hydrapple. Lore: It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns. It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple.
